01 — About me

Who I am

I'm an IT Diploma student at Government Polytechnic for Girls, Surat with a strong foundation in core computer concepts, database management, and technical problem-solving.

I've completed internships in web development and Python & data processing, gaining hands-on experience in building solutions, cleaning data, and verifying system workflows.

I'm a fast learner and collaborative team player seeking an entry-level position or internship to contribute and grow my technical skills in the IT industry.
